lineage: Median hourly pay = median annual salary / annual hours
Hours required = item price / median hourly pay

methodology.2025: 2025 values are provisional annual estimates based on year-to-date published market and official releases where full-year figures are not yet finalized.
methodology.house: House-price series combines long-run historical anchor points (1950s onward) with modern UK HPI annual averages. For missing annual points between historical anchors, geometric interpolation is used to create a continuous annual series.
methodology.coverage: All denominators except bitcoin now run annually from 1950–2025. For series that start later in official publications, earlier years are reconstructed using CPI-deflated back-casting anchored on the first observed datapoint and conservative item-specific real-trend assumptions.
methodology.confidence: Point colours represent source-confidence tiers from metadata: high (official/statutory), medium (market benchmark + standard transformations), low (proxy reconstruction from adjacent series).
methodology.commodities: Copper, silver and Brent series are assembled from commodity benchmark datasets (Pink Sheet / exchange benchmarks) with USDGBP conversion and pre-benchmark splicing using nearest liquid proxy contracts.

schema.series_split_recommendation: Move to one file per category/series as dataset grows
schema.interpolation_policy: Explicitly flagged in each item metadata and methodology section
